post.summary: Provision the read-only demo account and demo content
post.description: Idempotent admin-only setup for environments without direct database access. Refused on production unless ALLOW_DEMO_SEED=true is set, so it can never seed demo data into production by accident.

parameters.name: X-Locale
parameters.description: Response language for localized content. Defaults to `en` when omitted.

get.description: Filter by translation availability with `?locale=` (primaryLocale match or non-empty `translations[locale].questionText`); list items resolve rubric for that locale when set, otherwise for `X-Locale` (default `en`). Use `?primaryLocale=` for canonical locale only. Deprecated: `?outputLanguage=`. Pass `?includeTranslations=true` for the full map per item.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search over question text, role, category, subcategory, tags.

parameters.name: subcategory
parameters.description: Subcategory — exposed as the "Type" filter in the picker UI.

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: ANY-match: rows whose tags array overlaps the given list. Send as ?tags=react,hooks or repeated.

parameters.name: primaryLocale
parameters.description: Filter by canonical question locale (primary_locale).

parameters.name: outputLanguage
parameters.description: Deprecated: use primaryLocale (en|be|ru|pl). Legacy outputLanguage labels map to locale: en→English, be→Belarusian, ru→Russian, pl→Polish (aliases such as english/polish also accepted on input).

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description: Filter: `primaryLocale === locale` OR non-empty `translations[locale].questionText`. When set, each list item resolves `questionText` and rubric for this locale (with primary fallback). When omitted, items follow `X-Locale` (default `en`).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Non-super_admin callers are forced to "active" regardless of what they pass.

parameters.name: includeTranslations
parameters.description: When true, each list item includes the full translations map. Default false.

parameters.name: eligibleForInterview
parameters.description: When true, only interview-eligible (active) questions are returned

parameters.name: X-Locale
parameters.description: Response language for localized content. Defaults to `en` when omitted.

post.description: Requires `primaryLocale` (en|be|ru|pl) and a full `translations[primaryLocale]` block (questionText, followUpQuestions, expectedConcepts, redFlags, sampleGoodAnswer). Response rubric is resolved for `primaryLocale` (not `X-Locale`). Metadata fields (role, category, tags, …) are stored flat on the question row.

parameters.name: X-Locale
parameters.description: Response language for localized content. Defaults to `en` when omitted.

post.description: Generates a question draft in locale from body `locale` or X-Locale header. If `mode=translate`, translates the full primary content block from `question.primaryLocale` to body `locale` (requires both locales and the complete primary rubric; preserves concept/red-flag ids 1:1) and returns the content block only. If `mode=generate`, returns identity fields (externalId, role, focus, category, subcategory, difficulty, weight, minimumPassScore, tags) plus the full rubric content block in the target locale; seed metadata is context only and is not returned. Does not persist anything to the database.

parameters.name: X-Locale
parameters.description: Used when body `locale` is omitted. Defaults to `en`.

get.description: Returns each filter facet (difficulty / category / subcategory / role / tags) with a per-value count. Uses the same query filters as GET /questions (including ?locale=, ?primaryLocale=, ?q=, tags, status). Deprecated: ?outputLanguage= (use primaryLocale). The facet being counted is omitted from the filter so counts show remaining options.

get.description: Nested editor shape: `primaryLocale`, flat metadata, resolved rubric for `X-Locale`, and `translations` map (omit with `?includeTranslations=false`). Legacy rows with only `outputLanguage` and flat columns map to `primaryLocale` and hydrate the primary translation block on read. Non–super-admin callers receive 404 for soft-deleted questions.

parameters.name: includeTranslations
parameters.description: When false, omit the translations map. Default true for GET /questions/:id.

parameters.name: X-Locale
parameters.description: Response language for localized content. Defaults to `en` when omitted.

put.description: `PUT` and `PATCH` are equivalent: both merge the body (default `translationsMode=merge`). Use `translationsMode=replace` with a full `translations` map for a full locale-map replace. `primaryLocale` is immutable — changing it returns 400. Patching `translations[primaryLocale]` or using `replace` requires the full five-field primary block (enforced in the service). Metadata-only patches are allowed when stored content stays valid.

parameters.name: X-Locale
parameters.description: Response language for localized content. Defaults to `en` when omitted.

patch.description: `PUT` and `PATCH` are equivalent: both merge the body (default `translationsMode=merge`). Use `translationsMode=replace` with a full `translations` map for a full locale-map replace. `primaryLocale` is immutable — changing it returns 400. Patching `translations[primaryLocale]` or using `replace` requires the full five-field primary block (enforced in the service). Metadata-only patches are allowed when stored content stays valid.

post.description: Deprecated compatibility endpoint. Use POST /questions/ai/draft. Supports two scenarios: `translate` (full primary content block from `question.primaryLocale` to body `locale`; ids preserved 1:1; content-only response) and `generate` (identity + full rubric content block; seed metadata is context, not returned). When `mode` is omitted, locale mismatch with full primary content triggers translate mode automatically.

post.summary: Mark an interview as the demo interview
post.description: Admin-only. Flips the interview to demo and reassigns it to the demo account, removes the fabricated placeholder demo interview and demotes any other completed demo interview so exactly the marked completed interview plus the seeded pending one remain. Re-running the demo provisioning afterwards will not recreate the placeholder. Refused on production unless ALLOW_DEMO_SEED=true is set.

info.title: Interview App API
info.description: Interview App backend API. i18n: `docs/locale-and-api.md`. Spec: `openapi/openapi.json` (`npm run openapi:check`). Global `X-Locale` (en|be|ru|pl, default en). Errors: `code` in `src/common/errors/api-error.registry.ts`.

onboardingCompletedAt.description: When the user finished or skipped first-time onboarding. Null means onboarding is pending.

status.description: How the user closed onboarding. Both values persist the same completion timestamp.

followUpQuestions.description: Optional for non-primary locales. Required for primaryLocale.

expectedConcepts.description: Optional for non-primary locales. Required for primaryLocale.

redFlags.description: Optional for non-primary locales. Required for primaryLocale.

sampleGoodAnswer.description: Optional for non-primary locales. Required for primaryLocale.

href.description: Staff app path to open the blocking interview.

outputLanguage.description: Legacy display label derived from primaryLocale. Deprecated: use primaryLocale (en|be|ru|pl). Legacy outputLanguage labels map to locale: en→English, be→Belarusian, ru→Russian, pl→Polish (aliases such as english/polish also accepted on input).

translations.description: Locale-keyed rubric blocks (`Record<locale, QuestionTranslationDto>`). Included by default on GET /questions/:id; on list GET when `?includeTranslations=true`; always on POST/PUT/PATCH responses.

pendingDeletion.description: True when deletion is scheduled because the question is still used by active interviews.

blockingInterviews.description: Present when pendingDeletion is true — active interviews still using this question.

usageCount.description: Number of times this question has been used in an interview.

outputLanguage.description: Legacy display label derived from primaryLocale. Deprecated: use primaryLocale (en|be|ru|pl). Legacy outputLanguage labels map to locale: en→English, be→Belarusian, ru→Russian, pl→Polish (aliases such as english/polish also accepted on input).

translations.description: Locale-keyed rubric blocks (`Record<locale, QuestionTranslationDto>`). Included by default on GET /questions/:id; on list GET when `?includeTranslations=true`; always on POST/PUT/PATCH responses.

pendingDeletion.description: True when deletion is scheduled because the question is still used by active interviews.

blockingInterviews.description: Present when pendingDeletion is true — active interviews still using this question.

usageCount.description: Number of times this question has been used in an interview.

resolvedLocale.description: Locale of returned questionText and rubric fields.

fallbackFromLocale.description: Requested X-Locale (or ?locale= on list). Omitted when resolvedLocale matches. Also set when rubric fields partially fall back to primaryLocale while questionText matches the request.

total.description: Total rows matching the filter, ignoring page/limit.

outputLanguage.description: Deprecated: use primaryLocale (en|be|ru|pl). Legacy outputLanguage labels map to locale: en→English, be→Belarusian, ru→Russian, pl→Polish (aliases such as english/polish also accepted on input).

locale.description: Locale for generated draft text (`en`|`be`|`ru`|`pl`). Defaults to `en`. When omitted, uses `X-Locale` header (also defaults to `en`).

mode.description: Optional explicit mode. `translate` translates the full primary content block from `question.primaryLocale` to body `locale` (one target locale per call); concept/red-flag ids are preserved 1:1; returns content block only. Requires body `locale`, `question.primaryLocale`, and the full primary rubric in the request. `generate` returns identity fields plus the primary locale rubric content block. If omitted, mode is auto-detected: locale mismatch + full primary content => translate, otherwise generate.

count.description: Number of active questions with this value, given the rest of the current filters.

difficulties.description: Difficulty value + count, given all OTHER current filters (difficulty itself is not applied).

categories.description: Category value + count, given all OTHER current filters (category itself is not applied).

subcategories.description: Subcategory value + count, given all OTHER current filters (subcategory itself is not applied). Exposed as the "Type" facet in the picker.

roles.description: Role value + count, given all OTHER current filters (role itself is not applied).

tags.description: Tag value + count, given all OTHER current filters (tag overlap is not applied).

translations.description: Locale-keyed rubric blocks. The primaryLocale entry must include all five fields: questionText, followUpQuestions, expectedConcepts, redFlags, sampleGoodAnswer. Additional locales require questionText only; rubric fields are optional.

outputLanguage.description: Ignored when translations are provided. Deprecated: use primaryLocale (en|be|ru|pl). Legacy outputLanguage labels map to locale: en→English, be→Belarusian, ru→Russian, pl→Polish (aliases such as english/polish also accepted on input).

category.description: Flat question metadata — stored on the question row, not inside translations.

primaryLocale.description: Ignored on update — primaryLocale is immutable after creation. Update the primary locale block via `translations[primaryLocale]` instead.

translationsMode.description: How to apply `translations`. Default `merge` upserts each locale key. Set to `replace` to replace the entire stored map (requires `translations`).

translations.description: Locale blocks to merge or replace. primaryLocale must remain a full block; non-primary locales require questionText only and may omit rubric fields.

outputLanguage.description: Ignored when primaryLocale or translations are set. Deprecated: use primaryLocale (en|be|ru|pl). Legacy outputLanguage labels map to locale: en→English, be→Belarusian, ru→Russian, pl→Polish (aliases such as english/polish also accepted on input).

questionText.description: Updates the primary locale block when translations are omitted (legacy partial update).

questionCount.description: Number of currently-resolvable questions (references that are deleted or pending deletion are excluded).

storedQuestionCount.description: Number of ids stored on the template, including references that no longer resolve. When higher than questionCount, some saved questions are gone.

questions.description: Live question rows resolved from the stored ids, in stored order, for the request locale. Seeds the interview question picker on edit and prefill.

createdById.description: Id of the user who created the template (attribution only).

usageCount.description: Popularity: how many interviews have been created from this template.

questionCount.description: Number of currently-resolvable questions (references that are deleted or pending deletion are excluded).

storedQuestionCount.description: Number of ids stored on the template, including references that no longer resolve. When higher than questionCount, some saved questions are gone.

createdById.description: Id of the user who created the template (attribution only).

usageCount.description: Popularity: how many interviews have been created from this template.

questionIds.description: Ordered question ids. Stored as live references and resolved to current questions on read; at least one is required (empty templates are rejected).

interviewLocale.description: Locale for interview UI and feedback. Defaults to en when omitted.

templateId.description: Template this interview was started from. When set, the template popularity (usage_count) is incremented in the same transaction, so usage is recorded server-side rather than by a separate client call.

interviewLocale.description: Interview language used for AI evaluation and summary text.

improvements.description: Improvement notes in interviewLocale (same language as general summary).

questions.description: Resolved for interviewLocale on read (resolvedLocale, availableLocales).
Resolved for interviewLocale on read (resolvedLocale, availableLocales).

versionNumber.description: Answer attempt/version being recorded. Omit when starting the next attempt.
Answer attempt/version being recorded. Omit when starting the next attempt.
Answer attempt/version being recorded. Required for multipart re-upload of an existing attempt.
Answer attempt/version being recorded. Required for multipart re-upload of an existing attempt.
Answer attempt/version being recorded. Required for multipart re-upload of an existing attempt.

message.example: Lightsail backend is serving the latest deploy.

resolvedLocale.description: Locale of returned text and followUpQuestions. Resolved via contentLocale → interviewLocale → primaryLocale → any available translation.

fallbackFromLocale.description: Locale the candidate asked for: contentLocale query param, or interviewLocale when contentLocale is omitted. Omitted when resolvedLocale equals that requested locale.

interviewLocale.description: Locale used for AI-generated feedback text (interview.interviewLocale). v1 is single-locale only — not multi-locale.

generalFeedback.description: Overall AI summary in interviewLocale (stored at completion).

improvements.description: Improvement notes in interviewLocale (aggregated from weak answers).
